_meta.status: design only -- no generator, no microdata
_meta.description: Permutation space over the factor axes for the nested worst-cell coverage design. Each factor carries provenance (observed|fused|assumed). 'has central heating' DROPPED (near-constant).
_meta.provenance_discipline: observed=jointly measured in open source; fused=stated CI with measurable-ish shared keys; assumed=crossed conservatively (no basis)
_meta.block: tenure/accommodation/cars/nssec are the COUPLED observed block (spine=tenure); sampled from the fused block joint P(T)P(A|T)P(C|T)P(S|T), not crossed independently
_meta.fuel_pinning: heating_fuel is PINNED to region via P(fuel|region); the off-gas tail (oil,lpg,heat_network) is region-specific and never scattered uniformly
_meta.provenance_note_stage3: solar_PV/EV/price_sensitivity/channel_pref were prior-believed FUSED but the enforced fusion gate (register FUSION_BAR_RESIDUAL_v1) forces ASSUMED (residual unmeasurable). All D/E tech+attitude dims are CROSSED against the observed block -- that is where N is spent, honestly.
_meta.determinism: Build is deterministic and hash-independent: all set iterations sorted; verified identical output under PYTHONHASHSEED 0 and 1. Nesting = greedy prefix (cohorts[:100] subset [:200] subset [:500] subset [:1000]).

nssec.note: NS-SeC 9-cat banded to 4 for design tractability (open income/class proxy; true income FRS-gated)

heating_fuel.note: Census TS046 12-cat banded to 7; 'has central heating' DROPPED as a dimension (near-constant 98.5%)

green_stance.note: attitudes never openly observed jointly with fabric/tech -> crossed (assumed), per ruling

price_sensitivity.note: fused onto income-proxy (nssec+tenure) under stated CI; residual UNMEASURABLE -> declared risk | RECLASSIFIED fused->assumed by the enforced fusion gate (residual unmeasurable = no positive evidence = cross).

channel_pref.note: fused onto age band; residual unmeasurable -> declared risk | RECLASSIFIED fused->assumed by the enforced fusion gate (residual unmeasurable = no positive evidence = cross).

solar_PV.note: fused onto tenure+dwelling+region (MCS area density); residual unmeasurable | RECLASSIFIED fused->assumed by the enforced fusion gate (residual unmeasurable = no positive evidence = cross).

EV.note: DfT VEH0135 area-level only; fused onto region+tenure+income; residual unmeasurable | RECLASSIFIED fused->assumed by the enforced fusion gate (residual unmeasurable = no positive evidence = cross).

home_battery.note: co-ownership tail unobservable -> crossed (assumed), the honest default per ruling
